name: Cartesia AI
what_it_does: Ultra-low-latency text-to-speech API focused on real-time voice AI — Cartesia's Sonic model achieves sub-90ms time-to-first-audio with high quality voice output.
use_cases: Real-time voice AI agent conversations requiring sub-100ms TTS latency
Phone-call voice agents where every millisecond of latency matters
Live streaming audio generation for interactive voice applications
Voice AI applications where ElevenLabs/OpenAI latency is too high
Multi-speaker audio generation with different voices per turn
not_for: Batch audio generation (ElevenLabs or OpenAI TTS are more cost-effective for non-real-time use)
Applications where voice library breadth matters more than latency
Large-scale content production where per-character costs are a concern
best_when: You're building a real-time voice AI agent where latency is critical — Cartesia leads the industry in time-to-first-audio.
avoid_when: You need high-volume batch TTS or a large library of pre-existing voices — Cartesia's value prop is specifically low-latency real-time.

auth.notes: API key passed as X-API-Key header. Single key with full account access — no granular scoping.

pricing.free_tier_limits: $5 credit on sign-up; no ongoing free tier
pricing.notes: More expensive per-character than OpenAI TTS but lower latency justifies premium for real-time use cases.

performance.rate_limits: Not prominently published; contact for high-volume needs

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP error responses. WebSocket streaming errors follow standard codes. Documentation is good but thinner than ElevenLabs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: TTS is deterministic for same inputs. Safe to retry without side effects.
known_agent_gotchas: WebSocket-based streaming requires persistent connection management in agents
Voice IDs must be pre-fetched — no lookup by name during generation
Rate limits are not publicly documented — agents may encounter unexpected throttling
Relatively new API — breaking changes between versions have occurred
Limited voice library compared to ElevenLabs (but you can clone voices)

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS and WSS enforced. API key lacks scope granularity — rotate regularly. SOC 2 in progress. Startup-stage company; security practices less mature than ElevenLabs.
